title: QuestZ
description: Enhances the advancement system of minecraft for a simple quest system
body:
![Headline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbcbf7e762f4796230af442f8a36fe5e721150ee.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/QuestZ/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/QuestZ/issues)


Enhances the advancement system of minecraft and reuses it for a quest system. This is an old mod idea, started a couple years ago and now I finished it. It is meant for a simple main quest line. With the provided ingame editor you can create quests. Just activate the editor mode at the top right corner of the quest screen. If editor mode is activated (requires op + creative mode): - Left click + hold to drag - Middle click to copy and edit - Right click to edit ![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b5983c36e59faf2c0a74c5eb00c243e43e5802f.png)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
